title: GunSyncS2CPacket (S to C gun data sync) + 4 trigger scenarios
reference_files: C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L2038-2059 (GunSyncS2CPacket design: trigger scenarios, content, client uses)
acceptance_criteria: GunSyncS2CPacket record implements CustomPacketPayload with Codec + StreamCodec
Packet fields: installedPlugins list (pluginId + instanceUuid + installedTypeId + locked per entry), modifierVersion (int), per-gun state map (state ID -> value)
4 trigger scenarios implemented: (1) player switches main hand item, (2) plugin install/uninstall, (3) player joins world (full sync), (4) per-gun state modified by hook (next tick sync round)
Server-side: GunSyncService monitors trigger conditions and sends packet to target player
Client handler stub: stores synced gun data for plugin overlay rendering and tooltip display (actual rendering in subtasks 14/15)
Packet registered in ModularShootPackets via PayloadRegistrar.playToClient
